pi_items.verified_value: K083 is a real OHIP code, but it is EXPIRED as of November 30, 2022

K083 does NOT have a fixed fee of $45.00. K083 is unit-based at $5 per unit, with total fee being variable depending on the service being billed. A $45 fee would represent 9 units (9 × $5 = $45), but K083 itself is not a fixed-fee code
pi_items.source: OHIP billing documentation and multiple sources (https://www.doctorcare.ca/wp-content/uploads/2022/11/DoctorCare_Virtual-Care-Codes_ON_Nov2022.pdf) and (https://doctorcare.ca/the-most-common-ohip-billing-codes-for-mental-health-care/)

pi_items.verified_value: K083 is for 'specialist consultation by telephone or video', not specifically for mental health. K082 (not K083) is the mental health-specific code for 'psychotherapy, psychiatric or mental health counselling by telephone or video'. The keyword 'Telephone' is accurate, but 'Mental' is misleading as K083 applies to all specialist consultations via telephone/video, not mental health specifically
pi_items.source: OHIP documentation and Dr.Bill psychiatry guide (https://www.dr-bill.ca/blog/ohip/psychiatry-clarification-of-virtual-care-options-covid-19)

pi_items.verified_value: OSCAR EMR default password is 'mac2002', but the environment setup script (setup_oscar.sh) explicitly changes it to 'oscar' with SHA-1 hash '45-179-551441115-117798-30877213-3052-6889-30-60'. For this specific environment, the password is 'oscar'
pi_items.source: OSCAR EMR documentation (https://oscaremr.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/OS/pages/85559941/Getting+started+with+a+manual+installation) and local setup_oscar.sh script analysis (lines 210-217)
OSCAR EMR documentation (https://oscaremr.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/OS/pages/85559941/Getting+started+with+a+manual+installation) and setup_oscar.sh script confirmation

privileged_info_summary: OSCAR EMR is a real, open-source electronic medical record system originally created by McMaster University in 2001. The environment uses MariaDB 10.5 and openosp/open-osp Docker deployment. Default login credentials oscardoc/PIN 1117 are verified; the setup changes password from OSCAR default 'mac2002' to 'oscar'. However, critical issue: K083 is a REAL but EXPIRED OHIP billing code (expired November 30, 2022). K083 was for specialist consultation by telephone/video, not specifically mental health (K082 is the mental health-specific code). K083 never had a fixed $45 fee - it is unit-based at $5 per unit with variable total depending on service. The task data is synthetic (Synthea-style Canadian patient demographics loaded into containerized OSCAR environment).
